title: Order relative to authorizing the joint committee on Agriculture and Fisheries to make an investigation and study of a certain current Senate document relative to include the growing and cultivation of both hemp and marijuana in the definition of agriculture.

abstracts.abstract: Senate, The committee on Agriculture and Fisheries, to whom was referred the petitions (accompanied by bill, Senate, No. 70) of Jacob R. Oliveira for legislation to include the growing and cultivation of both hemp and marijuana in the definition of agriculture, report the accompanying Order (Senate, No. 2806).

actions.description: Reported from the committee on Agriculture and Fisheries
Order reported favorably by committee and referred to the committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently

related_entities.name: committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently
the committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently

actions.description: Discharged to the committee on Senate Rules

sponsorships.name: Joint Committee on Agriculture and Fisheries
